name: The Simpsons Hit & Run
aliases: Lucas Simpsons Hit & Run Mod Launcher

steps.exe: mods & launcher/lucas simpsons hit & run mod launcher.exe

post_apply_message:
The Simpsons Hit & Run — auto-sets up the modded-launcher shortcut:
1. Apply — it AUTO-ADDS the Steam shortcut pointing at 'Lucas Simpsons Hit & Run Mod Launcher.exe' (NOT the raw Game/Simpsons.exe — the launcher applies your .lmlm mods and starts the game), named 'The Simpsons Hit & Run', gospel appid 3714559883, GE-Proton 10.34. Steam closes briefly to write it. Stage GE first with 'gfm stage-runner' (install_runner side-loads it from the NAS; it's optional so nothing blocks if GE is missing).
2. Launch it, tick which mods to enable in the launcher UI, Play.
Everything is SD-resident: Game/ (base game + your Save1 ~7KB) and Mods & Launcher/ (the launcher + mods) — so it survives reimages by location, no prefix sync needed.
NOTE: the Lucas launcher is a .NET app; GE's wine-mono usually runs it, but if it won't start, 'protontricks <appid> dotnet48'.
notes: REWORKED 2026-07-10: added install_runner + steam_shortcut. The shortcut targets the LUCAS MOD LAUNCHER (mods & launcher/lucas simpsons hit & run mod launcher.exe) not the game exe — the launcher activates the .lmlm mods at runtime and boots the game. Game is nested: <folder>/game/simpsons.exe + <folder>/mods & launcher/ (both lowercase, per the SD scan — marker updated to game/simpsons.exe). Gospel appid 3714559883. Mods (.lmlm) already installed in Mods & Launcher/Mods/ — GFM writes nothing into the game files. Save file (game/Save1, ~7KB) lives IN the game folder — SD-resident, reimage-proof by location. Confirmed mods (2026-07-07): Controller Button Icons, HQ Dialogue (FLAC, 375MB), More Costumes 3.0, NeverBusted, NoAudio, NoHUD, NoLicenseScreenDelay, NoTraffic, RepairCarOnReset, Speedometer, TextNames, UnlockAllRewards. Future work: persist mod-enable state (pfx/.../AppData/Roaming/Lucas/...) via the perf/state capture.
